author: mark
text:
make hooks target + env scrub fix

Add a 'make hooks' target wired to scripts/install-hooks.sh and
document it in README. Fix install-hooks.sh to use --git-common-dir
so it works from any linked worktree and points its symlink at
the MAIN checkout (not the worktree that happened to run it).

Also scrub GIT_DIR, GIT_INDEX_FILE, GIT_WORK_TREE, GIT_COMMON_DIR,
GIT_OBJECT_DIRECTORY, GIT_ALTERNATE_OBJECT_DIRECTORIES, and
GIT_PREFIX from every git child balls spawns. Real fix for a bug
where bl invoked inside a git hook inherited the outer repo's
GIT_DIR. Discovered because cargo test inside our own pre-commit
hook was passing git_state::create_orphan_branch_in_non_git_dir_errors
— mktree was silently reaching the enclosing repo via env rather
than erroring on the tempdir.
